name: 46ki75-plugins
description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins: bundled Agent Skills and workflow hooks.

plugins.name: ai-protocols
plugins.description: Expert knowledge skills for AI agent protocols: A2A, A2UI, AG-UI, and MCP.

plugins.name: web-frontend
plugins.description: Frontend and browser-extension development skills: Qwik, the View Transition API, and WXT.

plugins.name: prompt-engineering
plugins.description: Eval-driven prompt refinement skills for the Anthropic / Claude API and for Claude Code.

plugins.name: authoring
plugins.description: Document authoring skills: Markdown linting/fixing and Mermaid diagram creation.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Engineering workflow skills: Conventional Commits, org development standards, and a Known Error Database (KEDB).

plugins.name: rust
plugins.description: Rust development skills. Currently bundles Toasty ORM (v0.7) guidance.

plugins.name: wsl-notification
plugins.description: Sends Claude Code Notification and Stop events as Windows toast notifications from WSL2 via powershell.exe.
